name: test_online_consent_school_moves_with_existing_patient
description:
Test: Submit online flu consent for an existing child and
change schools.
Steps:
1. Fill in child and parent details and change schools.
2. Verify the school move is created in Mavis and confirm it.
3. Navigate to the session at the new school and go to consent tab.
4. Search for the child and verify the correct consent appears.
Verification:
- The consent method displayed in the session matches the expected method.
descriptionHtml:
Test: Submit online flu consent for an existing child and
change schools.
Steps:

  1. Fill in child and parent details and change schools.
  2. Verify the school move is created in Mavis and confirm it.
  3. Navigate to the session at the new school and go to consent tab.
  4. Search for the child and verify the correct consent appears.
    Verification:
  • The consent method displayed in the session matches the expected method.
statusMessage:
AssertionError: Locator expected to contain text 'Consent confirmedNicole GOODWIN is due to get the nasal spray flu vaccination at school'
Actual value: None
Error: element(s) not found 
Call log:
  - Expect "to_contain_text" with timeout 5000ms
  - waiting for locator(".nhsuk-panel.nhsuk-panel--confirmation")
statusTrace:
setup_session_with_file_upload = '/consents/opUku6dged/flu/start'
start_consent_with_session_scheduled = None
page = <Page url='http://13.40.118.81:4000/consents/378/edit/ethnicity'>
schools = [School(name='Holy Trinity Lamorbey Church of England School', urn='142229', site=None), School(name='Longney Church of England Primary Academy', urn='142434', site=None)]
children = {'HPV': [Child(first_name='Kathryn', last_name='GLOVER', nhs_number='9962362423', address=('Flat 90M', 'Miles Circles'...Parent(full_name='Jacqueline Begum', relationship=<Relationship.MUM: 'Mum'>, email_address='myersneil@example.com')))]}

    def test_online_consent_school_moves_with_existing_patient(
        setup_session_with_file_upload,
        start_consent_with_session_scheduled,
        page,
        schools,
        children,
    ):
        """
        Test: Submit online flu consent for an existing child and
        change schools.
        Steps:
        1. Fill in child and parent details and change schools.
        2. Verify the school move is created in Mavis and confirm it.
        3. Navigate to the session at the new school and go to consent tab.
        4. Search for the child and verify the correct consent appears.
        Verification:
        - The consent method displayed in the session matches the expected method.
        """
        child = children[Programme.FLU][0]
        schools = schools[Programme.FLU]
    
        # First consent
        OnlineConsentWizardPage(page).fill_details(
            child, child.parents[0], schools, change_school=True
        )
        OnlineConsentWizardPage(page).agree_to_flu_vaccination(
            consent_option=ConsentOption.NASAL_SPRAY_OR_INJECTION
        )
        OnlineConsentWizardPage(page).fill_address_details(*child.address)
        OnlineConsentWizardPage(page).answer_health_questions(
            len(
                Programme.health_questions(
                    Programme.FLU, ConsentOption.NASAL_SPRAY_OR_INJECTION
                )
            ),
            yes_to_health_questions=False,
        )
        OnlineConsentWizardPage(page).click_confirm()
>       OnlineConsentWizardPage(page).check_final_consent_message(
            child,
            programmes=[Programme.FLU],
            yes_to_health_questions=False,
            consent_option=ConsentOption.NASAL_SPRAY_OR_INJECTION,
        )
